tests.title: Multi-level 45 m / 10 min then 30 m / 15 min, Tx21/35 + EAN50, GF 30/70 (salt)
tests.purpose: NEW: multi-level profile (every seed scenario is single-level)

divekitSettings.note: Exact-match config: 9 m/min down to the 3 m last stop, then 3 m/min to the surface — mirrors MultiDeco run with deep = deco = 9 and surface = 3.

multidecoSettings.note: CAPTURED. MultiDeco: deep=deco=9, surface=3, Extended Stops 1/1, RMV 20/15. Entered 45 m for 10 min (incl. ~2.25 min descent => 7.75 min at depth, per the Lvl row) + 30 m for 15 min. Dive Kit level 1 set to 7.75 min to match at-depth time.

tests.title: Tx18/45 + Tx35/25 + EAN50 + O2, 70 m / 20 min, GF 30/70 (salt)
tests.purpose: NEW: deep trimix with travel gas + accelerated deco (three switches, O2 at 6 m)

divekitSettings.note: Exact-match config: 9 m/min to the 3 m last stop, then 3 m/min to surface.

multidecoSettings.note: CAPTURED. deep=deco=9, surface=3, Extended Stops 1/1, RMV 20/15. Entered ~20 min at 70 m (=> 16 at depth per Lvl row). Tx35/25 switch at 33 m (MultiDeco) vs 30 m (Dive Kit) — see notes.json/A2 for why. EAN50 at 21 m and O2 at 6 m match exactly.

tests.title: Tx21/35 + EAN50, 51 m / 25 min, GF 20/75 (salt)
tests.purpose: NEW: low GF Low on a deep trimix profile — contrasts GF-slope vs the GF 30/70 seeds

divekitSettings.note: Exact-match config: 9 m/min to the 3 m last stop, then 3 m/min to surface.

multidecoSettings.note: CAPTURED. GF 20/75, deep=deco=9, surface=3, Extended Stops 1/1, RMV 20/15. Entered ~25 min at 51 m (=> 22 at depth per Lvl row). Decozone 37 m — GF-independent, as predicted. EAN50 switch 21 m matches Dive Kit.

tests.title: Air 45 m / 22 min, 6 m last stop, GF 30/70 (salt)
tests.purpose: NEW: 6 m last stop (every seed uses 3 m) — cold-water / rough-surface protocol

divekitSettings.note: 6 m last stop: surface rate kicks in at 6 m, so change depth = 6 (9 m/min to the 6 m last stop, then 3 m/min to surface).

multidecoSettings.note: CAPTURED. Same as S2 (45 m air) but Last stop depth = 6 m. deep=deco=9, surface=3, Extended Stops 1/1, RMV 20/15. Entered ~22 min at 45 m (=> 19 at depth per Lvl row). Decozone 32 m — unchanged from S2 (last stop doesn't move it).

tests.title: Air 30 m / 25 min at 2000 m altitude (~795 mbar), GF 30/70 (fresh)
tests.purpose: NEW: altitude — exercises the surface-pressure path end to end

divekitSettings.note: 9 m/min to the 6 m last stop, then 3 m/min to surface. MultiDeco's A5 run used a 6 m last stop, so change depth = 6 here too.

multidecoSettings.note: CAPTURED. MultiDeco Elevation 2025 m, Fresh, LAST STOP 6 m, GF 30/70, deep=deco=9, surface=3, Extended Stops 1/1, RMV 20/15. Entered ~25 min at 30 m (=> 23 at depth). (Earlier apparent divergence was a 6 m-vs-3 m last-stop mismatch, now resolved — see notes.json A5.)

tests.title: Air + EAN50, 55 m / 20 min, GF 30/70 (salt)
tests.purpose: NEW: deep air — exercises gas-density and END (narcosis) warnings

divekitSettings.note: Exact-match config: 9 m/min to the 3 m last stop, then 3 m/min to surface.

multidecoSettings.note: CAPTURED. Salt, GF 30/70, air 21/0 + EAN50, deep=deco=9, surface=3, Extended Stops 1/1, RMV 20/15. Entered ~20 min at 55 m (=> 17 at depth). EAN50 switch 21 m matches Dive Kit. Density 7.7 g/L (MultiDeco) vs Dive Kit's higher value — temperature-assumption offset.

divekitSettings.note: CCR cross-val config: deep 9 / shallow 3, change depth 6 (matches the CCR doc + test_ccr_deco).

multidecoSettings.note: CAPTURED. MultiDeco CCR mode: left column 40 m / 30 min, diluent 21/0, SP 1.3 (CCR leg); deco mixes empty (pure loop). GF 50/80, last stop 3 m, change depth 6. Entered 30 min => 28 at depth.

divekitSettings.note: CCR cross-val config: deep 9 / shallow 3, change depth 6.

tests.title: Repetitive: 30 m / 23 min air x2, 60 min SI, 6 m last stop, GF 30/70 (salt)
tests.purpose: NEW: repetitive dive — residual nitrogen carried across a surface interval. The COMPARED dive is the second (repeat); dive1 + SI precede it.

divekitSettings.note: 9 to the 6 m last stop, then 3 to surface (MultiDeco run used a 6 m last stop). The orchestrator chains dive1 -> 60 min SI -> dive2 via the engine's tissue-state I/O.

multidecoSettings.note: CAPTURED. dive 1 = 30 m / 25 min air (=> 23 at depth), 60 min surface interval, dive 2 = 30 m / 25 min air. LAST STOP 6 m (note: MultiDeco still had 6 m set). Recorded dive 2. Residual N2 shows clearly: dive 2's 6 m stop is 53 min vs dive 1's 22 (TTS 61 vs 30, CNS 10 vs 6).

tests.title: Air 48 m / 22 min, EAN45 + O2, GF 30/70 (salt)
tests.purpose: NEW: ppO2 band boundary — EAN45 sits exactly on the 45% mid/rich edge and must cap at 1.6 (rich, switch 24 m), not 1.5 (mid, switch 21 m)

divekitSettings.note: Exact-match config: 9 m/min to the 3 m last stop, then 3 m/min to surface.

multidecoSettings.note: CAPTURED. deep=deco=9, surface=3, Extended Stops 1/1, RMV 20/15. Entered 48 m for ~25 min (=> 22 at depth per Lvl row). KEY RESULT: EAN45 (exactly 45% O2) switches at 24 m with pO2 1.52 in BOTH tools — MultiDeco lets it run above 1.5, so it caps EAN45 at 1.6 (rich), confirming the >=45% -> rich boundary convention. O2 at 6 m exact. See notes.json/B1.

tests.title: PRECISE Tx18/45 + Tx35/25 travel + EAN50 + O2, 60 m / 20 min + 42 m / 8 min, GF 30/70 (salt)
tests.purpose: NEW: precise (1-second) stop times cross-checked against MultiDeco (min stop = 1 s) — the only sub-minute scenario; also exercises a travel-gas descent switch and a multi-level profile

divekitSettings.note: Exact-match config: 9 m/min to the 3 m last stop, then 3 m/min to surface. PRECISE mode (settings.roundStopsToMinutes=false => stopRoundingSeconds=0) with a 1 s minimum stop to match MultiDeco's min stop = 1 s. The first level (30 m / 0 min on Tx35/25) models the travel-gas descent: the engine breathes the first level's gas down to 30 m, then switches to Tx18/45 (the next level's gas) for the rest of the descent.

multidecoSettings.note: CAPTURED in PRECISE mode (MultiDeco min stop = 1 s). Descend on Tx35/25, switch to Tx18/45 at 30 m; multi-level 60 m (20 at depth) then 42 m (8). Sub-minute stops align closely with Dive Kit; switches EAN50 21 m and O2 6 m match exactly, Tx35/25 within one stop. Documented differences (NOT bugs): Dive Kit adds an explicit 1-min gas-switch hold per switch (MultiDeco folds it in) so DK runtime is a few min longer; ambient-ppO2 CNS runs higher; decozone differs on this multi-level dive by definition (DK uses the end-of-bottom state). See notes.json/P1.

tests.title: PRECISE Air 45 m / 22 min entered, 6 m last stop, GF 50/80 (salt)
tests.purpose: NEW: GF-high sensitivity pair from the June 2026 unsurfaceable-stop investigation — same dive at GF 50/80 vs 50/50 shows the 6 m hold stretching ~4.5x (engine and MultiDeco agree). Also the first tests using the ENTERED-time convention (descent folded into the first level, like MultiDeco's input) via includeTravelInLevelTime.

divekitSettings.note: 6 m last stop => surface rate kicks in at 6 m (change depth 6; 9 m/min above, 3 m/min after). PRECISE mode (stopRoundingSeconds=0, min stop 1 s) to match MultiDeco at min stop = 1 s. includeTravelInLevelTime=1: bottomTimeMin holds the ENTERED 22:00 exactly as typed into MultiDeco (descent-inclusive); both tools derive 19:45 at depth (45 m at 20 m/min = 2:15 descent). In the app this is Settings > Behaviour > Include travel in level time = ON with 22 min entered.

multidecoSettings.note: CAPTURED in PRECISE mode (min stop = 1 s). ZH-L16C, salt, GF 50/80, last stop 6 m, deep=deco=9 / surface=3, Extended Stops 1/1, RMV 20/15. Entered 22:00 at 45 m => Lvl 19:45 at depth (descent 2:15 at 20 m/min). Single gas (air), so the Extended Stops setting never engages.

tests.purpose: NEW: GF-high sensitivity pair from the June 2026 unsurfaceable-stop investigation — same dive at GF 50/80 vs 50/50 shows the 6 m hold stretching ~4.5x (engine and MultiDeco agree). Also the first tests using the ENTERED-time convention (descent folded into the first level, like MultiDeco's input) via includeTravelInLevelTime.

divekitSettings.note: 6 m last stop => surface rate kicks in at 6 m (change depth 6; 9 m/min above, 3 m/min after). PRECISE mode (stopRoundingSeconds=0, min stop 1 s) to match MultiDeco at min stop = 1 s. includeTravelInLevelTime=1: bottomTimeMin holds the ENTERED 22:00 exactly as typed into MultiDeco (descent-inclusive); both tools derive 19:45 at depth (45 m at 20 m/min = 2:15 descent). In the app this is Settings > Behaviour > Include travel in level time = ON with 22 min entered.

multidecoSettings.note: CAPTURED in PRECISE mode (min stop = 1 s). ZH-L16C, salt, GF 50/50, last stop 6 m, deep=deco=9 / surface=3, Extended Stops 1/1, RMV 20/15. Entered 22:00 at 45 m => Lvl 19:45 at depth (descent 2:15 at 20 m/min). Single gas (air), so the Extended Stops setting never engages.
